landing.heroTitlePrefix: Speedo Bill: The 10x Faster Billing System for
landing.heroSubtitle: Reduce counter rush, send WhatsApp receipts, and manage your inventory with India's easiest POS software.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card required · 7-day free trial
landing.featuresSubtitle: From front-of-house to back-of-house, Speedo Bill covers every aspect of restaurant operations.
landing.billingTitle: Print thermal receipts with UPI QR — instantly
landing.billingDesc: Every bill is GST-ready, prints crisp on 58mm/80mm thermal printers, and includes a scan-to-pay QR so guests can settle in seconds.
landing.inventoryTitle: Never run out of an ingredient again
landing.inventoryDesc: Real-time stock tracking with instant low-stock alerts on your phone. Auto-deduct ingredients per recipe with every order.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
landing.demoSubtitle: Fill in your details and a SpeedoBill expert will reach out on WhatsApp to set you up in minutes.

features.instantPosDesc: 3-tap billing designed for high-speed canteen counters.

features.inventoryCtrlDesc: Real-time tracking of ingredients and stock levels.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Speedo Bill. Can't find the answer? Chat with our team.
faq.q1: Does Speedo Bill work without internet (offline mode)?
faq.a1: Yes. Speedo Bill keeps billing functional even when your internet drops. Orders, KOTs and bills are queued locally on the device and automatically sync to the cloud the moment connectivity returns.
faq.q2: Is GST billing supported? Can I print GST-compliant invoices?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Enable GST from Settings, set your tax percentage, add your GSTIN, and every receipt will be a valid GST-compliant invoice with tax breakup.
faq.q3: Can I run Speedo Bill on multiple devices at the same time?
faq.a3: Yes. The Master POS runs on a PC, your waiters use the mobile app, and the kitchen sees orders live on the KOT display — all synced in real time.
faq.q4: How do I migrate my existing menu and customer data?
faq.a4: We offer free onboarding. Our team imports your existing menu, categories, prices and customer database. The AI Menu Scanner can also extract items from a photo of your printed menu.
faq.q5: Is my restaurant data safe and secure?
faq.a5: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest, hosted on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with daily backups. Role-based access control protects sensitive data.
faq.q6: What hardware do I need to get started?
faq.a6: Just an Android phone or any PC with a browser. Optionally connect a thermal printer, cash drawer, and kitchen display screen.
faq.q7: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a7: Yes. No long-term contracts. Upgrade, downgrade or cancel anytime from the Billing page.

auth.hotelCodeOwnerHint: Owners leave blank. Waiters, chefs & managers must enter their hotel code.
auth.hotelCodeStaffHint: Waiter and chef accounts need a valid owner hotel code before they can open the app.
